2606.24279.title: Tractable Reasoning and Conjunctive Query Answering for Defeasible DL-Lite under Rational Closure
2606.24279.paper_summary: In Description Logics (DLs), reasoning under Rational Closure (RC) is a well-known and widely accepted non-monotonic formalism to handle defeasible knowledge. In this paper, we study the application of RC to the core and horn variants of the DL-Lite family of lightweight description logics. We analyze both entitlement (instance checking) and Conjunctive Query (CQ) answering under RC. Our main contribution is providing a plug-in architecture that builds upon existing standard classical reasoners, establishing that reasoning and CQ answering under RC for DL-Lite can be done efficiently with minimal computational overhead.
2606.24279.paper_summary_zh: 在描述邏輯（DLs）中，基於理性閉包（RC）的推理是一種眾所周知且廣泛接受的非單調形式主義，用於處理可推翻的知識。<lb/>在本文中，我們研究RC在DL-Lite輕量級描述邏輯家族的核心和霍恩變體中的應用。<lb/>我們分析了在RC下的權限（實例檢查）和聯合查詢（CQ）回答。<lb/>我們的主要貢獻是提供一種插件架構，基於現有的標準古典推理器，確立了在DL-Lite下進行RC推理和CQ回答可以高效地完成，且計算開銷最小。
2606.24279.author: Giovanni Casini et.al.
